comments.comment: slightly less overall production running through dust collection system, thereby creating less Particulate matter fraction size 2.5 than in 2017

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: there was an increase in the amount of kiln dried lumber in 2018 (over double) due to an increase in the amount of rough dimensional lumber entering the site for kiln drying from other mill sites. In 2017, there wasn't any rough lumber accepted from other sites for kiln drying.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Shutdown of sawmill - 7 weeks in 2010, reduced shifts at the Planer.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Sawmill shutdown - total of 7 weeks in 2010 and reduction of Planer shifts

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Although the sawmill was shutdown for 7 weeks the dry kilns continued to run (24-7) even when the planer production was decreased.  Also ran our gas fired kiln more often.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increased drying/kiln production - quantity reported this year is greated than 2009.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Ran sawmill and planer on two shift with exception of shutdown periods.

comments.comment: Increase in production. Ran sawmill and planers on two shifts with exception of shutdown periods.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Planer production was reduce to one only shift for 10 months of the year.  The sawmill only ran for two months in 2008. 80 employees laid off.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Sawmill only ran from Oct. to Dec 2008. Only one line in the planer ran for the entire year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: We ran the sawmill for 3 months in 2008 and did not run in 2007. Also one shift in planer ran for entire year. Second shift in planer for for two months in 2008 and didn't run in 2007.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Most road dust as a results of log yard. Did not receive any Significant log deliveries after July. Production level reduced as Sawmill was shut down as of Oct to Dec. Natural Gas kiln not used after October.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Most road dust as a results of log yard. Did not receive any significant log deliveries after July. Production level reduced as Sawmill was shut down as of Oct to Dec. Natural Gas kiln not used after October.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Production in planer was reduced to one 8 hr shift. NO production in the sawmill in 2007. 100 employees laid off.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The sawmill was not in operation for the entire year (2007). 100 employees laid off. Only ran one line int heh planer @ 8 hr shift. Total of 30 employees working.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Only partial process on site was operational during the entire year.  The sawmill was shutdown and only one line in the planer and the dry kilns ran in 2007. Approx. 30 employees on site. Reduced production in planer from 2 to 1 shifting.

2002 - One ran one of the Konus burners during the summer months.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 2002 included 12 months of production vs. 2001 was only 4 months.  Therefore, amounts have increased.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increases from 2001 to 2002 was due to increased production.  In 2001 our mill was only in operation from Sept. - Dec. (due to labour dispute).  In 2002 there were 12 months of operation.
